---
title: Architecture
sidebar: architecture
---

This section covers the internal design and specifications for DerZug's core systems.

- [Design](design.md) — widget architecture and node types
- [Workflow Design](workflow-design.md) — the workflow engine design: tasks, graph model, execution, and Orange integration
- [Workflow Spec](workflow_spec.md) — public contract for the streaming workflow engine
- [Streaming Engine Spec](streaming-engine-spec.md) — the streaming-first execution model
